summary: Building features end-to-end across a Next.js front end and a MERN-stack backend, plus a React Native mobile app, with Redis caching to keep API response times low.
highlights: Developed and shipped full-stack features across a Next.js front end and a MERN (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js) backend.
Built and maintained a React Native mobile app alongside the web platform.
Introduced Redis caching on key API routes, cutting response times and easing load on the backend.
Owned production infrastructure end-to-end — provisioning, deploying, and keeping services humming across AWS EC2 instances and VPS environments.
Collaborated closely with the team to plan, build, and ship features from idea to production.

summary: Worked across a React front end and a Python FastAPI backend, fixing bugs and building features including an in-browser code compiler and LeetCode-style test running.
highlights: Built and maintained features across a React front end and a Python FastAPI backend.
Built an in-browser code compiler letting users write, run, and test code directly on the platform.
Developed LeetCode-style problem test running, including automated test execution and result feedback.
Diagnosed and fixed bugs across the stack to improve stability and the overall user experience.
